name: Possessed Villager
description: A tragic victim of the cult's shadow corruption experiments. Dark energy crackles around their body, and their eyes are ringed with darkness. They move with unnatural, jerky movements - puppets of dark magic.

attacks.name: Shadow-Touched Strike
attacks.description: A frenzied blow infused with corrupting shadow energy

special_abilities.name: Shadow Possession
special_abilities.description: Immune to fear and mind-affecting effects. Controlled by dark magic.

special_abilities.name: Corrupting Touch
special_abilities.description: Attacks may inflict shadow corruption, reducing max HP temporarily (15% chance)

special_abilities.name: Unnatural Vigor
special_abilities.description: Enhanced strength and endurance from shadow energy, feels no pain

behavior.notes: Mindlessly attacks nearest target. Never retreats. Tragic puppets controlled by shadow magic.
